headline: How Is GE HealthCare Technologies’ Stock Performance Compared to Other Health Tech Stocks?
summary: Altho\ugh GE HealthCare Technologies has lagged behind its peers in the HealthTech industry over the past year, analysts remain cautiously optimistic about the stock’s future performance.
